calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Off Calendar

Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Final Approval Hearing

Plaintiff Joshua Sweet's unopposed final approval hearing is granted.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)

Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSHUA SWEET'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Plaintiff Joshua Sweet's motion for final approval of class action settlement is granted. The Court finds the settlement to be fair, adequate, and reasonable.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)

Motion And Plaintiffs Unopposed Motion For Attorneys Fees, Costs And Service Award
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

LAINTIFF JOSHUA SWEET'S Motion For Attorneys Fees, Costs And Service Award.

Plaintiff Joshua Sweet's motion for attorneys' fees, costs, and service award is granted. The fees requested are only very slightly over the lodestar, and the costs are reasonable. The requested enhancement award for the named plaintiff is also reasonable under the circumstances.

Order is signed.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Continued To Mar-09-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JOSHUA SWEET's Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Court, having reviewed the supplemental Woodall declaration and the redlined versions of the proposed settlement agreement and class notice reflecting the amendments to those documents, grants plaintiff's motion for preliminary approval of the proposed agreement as amended.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-02-2021 Continued To Dec-20-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KEVIN F. WOODALL, Esq. of Woodall Law Offices (Tel: 415-413-4629) for plaintiff;
Atty. NATALIE FUJIKAWA, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) for defendant SF Tire & Service Central Inc.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JOSHUA SWEET's Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear to address the issues outlined in its tentative ruling. (See Word minutes for details.)

Counsel for parties indicate they accept and will incorporate the Court's concerns and suggestion into their supplemental papers.

The Court continues this matter for further hearing to December 20, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

The parties' supplemental papers are to be filed by December 13, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
